yellow.label: Edge cases failing
yellow.description: Works sometimes; edge cases still open.

generations.label: Generation I
generations.summary: Kanto / Game Boy era. No round-trip test posted for this generation yet.

generations.label: Generation II
generations.summary: Johto / Game Boy Color era. Self round-trip marked failing. Other routes for this generation are not tested yet.

generations.label: Generation III
generations.summary: Hoenn / Game Boy Advance era. No round-trip test posted for this generation yet.

generations.label: Generation IV
generations.summary: Sinnoh / Nintendo DS era. No round-trip test posted for this generation yet.

generations.label: Generation V
generations.summary: Unova / Nintendo DS era. No round-trip test posted for this generation yet.

generations.label: Generation VI
generations.summary: Kalos / Nintendo 3DS era. No round-trip test posted for this generation yet.

generations.label: Generation VII
generations.summary: Alola / Nintendo 3DS + Switch era. Self round-trip marked failing. Other routes for this generation are not tested yet.

generations.label: Generation VIII
generations.summary: Galar / Switch era. No round-trip test posted for this generation yet.

generations.label: Generation IX
generations.summary: Paldea / Switch era. No round-trip test posted for this generation yet.
